note: Each entry is a specific micro-interaction pattern, not a vague description. Select by ID in Stage 3. Minimum 3 must be assigned per site.

interactions.label: Magnetic Button
interactions.description: Button follows cursor with subtle translate offset. Returns to center on mouse leave.
interactions.css_js: JS: track cursor delta → apply transform: translate(x*0.3, y*0.3)

interactions.label: Text Scramble on Hover
interactions.description: Nav items or headlines scramble through random characters before resolving to the real text.
interactions.css_js: JS: interval replaces chars with random glyphs, settles to original over 300ms

interactions.label: Reveal Behind on Hover
interactions.description: Card or block clips to reveal different content behind it on hover — not just a color swap.
interactions.css_js: clip-path transition from edge to full reveal, or overflow hidden translate

interactions.label: SVG Line Draw on Scroll
interactions.description: An SVG path or decorative line draws itself as the section enters the viewport.
interactions.element: Section dividers, decorative elements, connector lines

interactions.label: Number Count-Up on Scroll
interactions.description: Statistics or numbers animate from 0 to their value when scrolled into view.
interactions.css_js: JS requestAnimationFrame count loop, easeOut timing

interactions.label: Parallax Text Layer
interactions.description: Text or headline moves at different speed from background on scroll, creating depth.
interactions.css_js: transform: translateY(scrollY * factor) on headline element

interactions.label: Custom Click Ripple
interactions.description: Click on CTA button creates a custom ripple effect — not the default Material ripple. Can be color, light burst, or particle.
interactions.css_js: JS: spawn absolutely-positioned element at click coords, animate scale + opacity out

interactions.label: Animated Focus Ring
interactions.description: Form inputs and buttons get a custom animated focus ring — not the default browser outline. Ring draws in or pulses.
interactions.css_js: outline: none; custom box-shadow or pseudo-element ring animation
interactions.note: Always include this — accessibility. The style varies per brand.

interactions.label: Expanding Underline on Hover
interactions.description: Link underline grows from 0 width to full on hover. Thickness, color, and speed derived from brand.
interactions.css_js: pseudo-element ::after with transform: scaleX(0→1), transform-origin: left

interactions.label: Image Clip-Path Reveal
interactions.description: Image section is clipped with clip-path: inset(100% 0 0 0) and reveals downward as it enters viewport.
interactions.css_js: clip-path transition from inset(100%) to inset(0%), 0.8s ease

interactions.label: 3D Tilt on Hover
interactions.description: Card tilts in 3D space following cursor position. Gives depth and physicality.
interactions.css_js: perspective + rotateX/rotateY from cursor position delta

interactions.label: Custom Cursor with Lag Follow
interactions.description: Replaces default cursor with a branded dot + ring. Ring follows with spring lag. Changes on hover over interactive elements.
interactions.css_js: JS: two elements, one instant, one lerp follow; class toggles on hover targets

interactions.label: Sticky Progress Indicator
interactions.description: A thin line or number at edge of screen shows scroll progress through the page/section.
interactions.css_js: width or height of line = scrollPercent%; or counter shows section number

interactions.label: Color Flood Fill on Hover
interactions.description: Hovering a block floods it with color from a point (cursor position), not just a fade.
interactions.css_js: radial-gradient from cursor origin expands to cover element

interactions.label: Staggered Load Entrance
interactions.description: On page load, elements appear in sequence with stagger delay — not all at once.
interactions.element: Nav, hero headline, hero CTA (load sequence)
interactions.css_js: opacity 0 → 1 + translateY with nth-child delay increments, CSS animation
matches_adjectives: all — this should almost always be present
